title: Living in Boulder blog 7 - 25 - 2017: Ancient Books. Exchanging pedals. No riding for a week.

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog explaining he skipped riding due to sore legs from previous days. He dropped his pedals at a bike shop for an exchange, expects about a week turnaround, and plans to spend that week working on his 'ancient books' education page on his website. He also mentions wanting to get his car fixed and possibly do a commercial for it.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Not worth it — more fun to ride when feeling good and going fast
Expects it will bring him to a higher level when he returns
Excited and fascinated; wants to catalog and eventually memorize all of them
Expects to drop weight and plans to find a scale to track it

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't ride today because I was recovering from the ride yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was up until sunrise but didn't need much sleep after that.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the bike shop and they took my pedals off to exchange them, which will take about a week.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not going to ride this week because I don't want to put my other pedals on.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to focus this week on organizing ancient books on my website's education page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I find it fascinating to see all the ancient books together because it's everything we have.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to memorize all the pages of the ancient books by scrolling through them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think memorizing the books will take about a week.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I also want to get a couple of things fixed on my car to make it better.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm really sore today, especially walking upstairs, so riding wouldn't have been good.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think taking a week off from riding will help me reach a higher level when I start again.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to buy a scale to start weighing myself because I expect to lose weight.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been focusing intensely on my projects and not listening to much else.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't think I could ride my bike on rollers while concentrating on other tasks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might not do a premiere on this video because it's annoying.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to figure out how to sync the mouth movements with the sound better.

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-Log for July 25th.
Right now it's 12, 19 in the morning, July 26th.
I didn't ride today.
I had insomnia last night, I guess because I was recovering from the ride yesterday.
Oh, my microphone.
Although I don't think it's hooked up because you still hear the warmth from the computer.
So I'll try to get that fixed tomorrow.
I didn't even think about that today.
So I was up until like sunrise.
But I didn't have to sleep that much after that.
I got up at like 9 or something.
And then went into the bike shop and they sent that.
I called Garmin and I had to just exchange him.
So I went into the bike shop and they took him off.
They're going to exchange him for me.
And then it'll take like, he said, like a week to get there.
And then I'll send it back.
So like a week and a half or something.
So I'm not going to ride.
I'm not going to put my other pedals on.
I only want that bike to know the good stuff.
So I'm going to just focus this week on my ancient books on my website, on my education page.
I was doing that today.
It's time to listen to me because there's a lot.
But it's fascinating because I want to see what they all look like together, scrunched up.
And when I know all the pages.
Because it's literally everything that we have.
It's going to be mind-blowing.
I want to know how many scroll downs, how many like page fulls it takes.
Like two or three.
But because if I can, if it's like three or whatever, two or three, I can memorize that in my head.
And then I can have all the books memorized in my head.
And then after that, you just memorize the books.
And then you have all the history memorized.
So, yeah, but it'll probably take all week maybe on that.
Yeah, I'm sure.
Rest of the week.
There's my week on that.
And then, yeah, more surface level stuff when I get my car.
I wanted to get a couple things fixed on my car to make it more.
And then do a commercial for it.
And then get that thing sold.
Yeah, so that's what I did today.
Yeah, but that's why my legs were really sore.
Like walking upstairs, they're really burning.
And so it wouldn't have been a good ride.
You know, it's more fun to ride when you're going fast and feel good.
So, yeah, I think these four rides got me into, you know, after I take a week off, I'll be at a next higher level.
So I'll be a little bit lighter.
I think I'll get a, find a scale in my own space.
And if I can't do that, I'll buy one and just start weighing myself.
Because I'll be dropping down a lot, you know, because I'm still a butterball.
Um, I haven't really been listening to anything.
We've just been watching Borgia.
But I've been, you know, snowball, focusing everything on this.
You know, like I couldn't ride my bike on the rollers and do this, I don't think.
I mean, I could, but it wouldn't be, it wouldn't, I wouldn't do it.
But I have to concentrate and, you know, absorb all of it.
Um, yeah.
So anyways, I think that's enough talking.
Peace out.
Maybe I won't do premiere on this because it's kind of annoying.
I want to figure out how, like, to make it so that the mouth aligns with the sound.
Yeah.
Um, okay, peace out.
